name: The Decagon House Murders
overview: The drama tells the story of a group of seven university students who travel to a deserted island where a strange decagonal mansion stands. It was the scene of a grisly mass murder six months earlier, and events soon turn ominous.

trailers.title: #Hulu で独占配信中📺 Huluオリジナル「#十角館の殺人」60秒本予告映像
